query:
UPDATE missions SET
  title = 'Save Your First $10',
  description = 'Put $10 into a savings account or a dedicated savings jar this week. This single action builds the habit that separates builders from spenders.',
  xp_reward = 50,
  gems_reward = 10,
  category = 'money',
  icon_emoji = '💰',
  sort_order = 1
WHERE id = 1;

UPDATE missions SET
  title = 'Learn What Credit Is',
  description = 'Research what a credit score is, how it is calculated, and why it matters. Write down 3 things you learned.',
  xp_reward = 30,
  gems_reward = 6,
  category = 'money',
  icon_emoji = '📊',
  sort_order = 2
WHERE id = 2;

UPDATE missions SET
  title = 'Track Spending for 1 Day',
  description = 'For one full day, write down every dollar you spend or see spent around you. At the end of the day, review the list.',
  xp_reward = 40,
  gems_reward = 8,
  category = 'money',
  icon_emoji = '📝',
  sort_order = 3
WHERE id = 3;
